name: seqwalk
description: Walk through AI-written code with interactive HTML sequence diagrams.

interface.shortDescription: Walk through code with interactive HTML sequence diagrams.
interface.longDescription: SeqWalk helps Codex users understand and review AI-written code by generating browser-validated HTML sequence diagrams. If it saves you review time, please buy the maintainer a coffee through the support section in the repository.
defaultPrompt: Use SeqWalk to diagram this code flow.
Create an interactive HTML sequence diagram.
Review this AI-written flow with SeqWalk.
